summary: Red-team review completed. The primary null/reverse result is blocked by a scenario-label mismatch between structural scenario_map_outcome_free labels and official score-map scenario labels in 120/150 cells. A scratch official-label LOTO check changes the primary increment direction, so the NULL cannot be treated as robust until the scenario crosswalk and all downstream analyses are rerun.
top_blockers: RT-BLOCK-001 scenario-label mismatch invalidates scenario fixed effects, LOSO, and A1 exclusion.
RT-BLOCK-002 A1 zero-score/safety reporting is false under the assembled tables.
coordination_circularity_verdict: Official generated/report metric with rule/kinematic components; acceptable only as official-score prediction outcome, not independent expert social ground truth.
narrative_overclaim_verdict: No final reader report overclaim exists, but Phase 4 report text overstates/incorrectly describes A1 safety handling and must be regenerated.
recommended_next_codex_task: Phase 7 fixer: repair scenario crosswalk, rerun Phase 4/controls/state-dependence, then rerun independent replication and red team.
